completed_tasks.name: Create deterministic synthetic packet fixtures and VCD golden files
Add normalized semantic assertions for timing, sample counts, metadata structure, and cleanup-safe writes
Finish CLI contract checks and artifact failure-path coverage
Execute manual DSLogic Plus export UAT with bounded, repeatable signals
completed_tasks.progress: Manual UAT reproduced a real-hardware VCD bug: export succeeds and metadata/device reuse look correct, but the VCD contains `#-nan` and `#inf`. A root cause has been identified and a fix is currently uncommitted in `crates/dsview-sys/bridge_runtime.c`.

remaining_tasks.name: Execute manual DSLogic Plus export UAT with bounded, repeatable signals

blockers.description: Phase 5 cannot be completed until the real-hardware VCD timestamp bug is fixed and the DSLogic Plus manual export UAT is re-run successfully.
blockers.workaround: Use the debug findings in `.planning/debug/vcd-export-nan-inf-timestamps.md` and the pending bridge fix in `crates/dsview-sys/bridge_runtime.c`, then rebuild `dsview-cli` and rerun the manual capture commands.

human_actions_pending.action: Reconnect or keep the DSLogic Plus available for a fresh manual export UAT after the timestamp fix is committed.
human_actions_pending.context: The final gate requires rerunning bounded captures on real hardware and checking the VCD no longer contains invalid timestamps.

decisions.decision: Treat current master as the only trusted 05-03 baseline and rebuild automated validation there instead of trusting old worktree results.
decisions.rationale: Previous 05-03 artifacts in older worktrees were incomplete/untrustworthy; rebuilding on master gave a clean, auditable baseline.

decisions.decision: Keep Phase 5 marked in progress even after all automated 05-03 work was merged.
decisions.rationale: Manual DSLogic Plus sign-off is an explicit phase-completion gate and must stay open until real-hardware validation passes.

decisions.decision: Open a dedicated debug investigation once manual UAT exposed `#-nan` / `#inf` timestamps.
decisions.rationale: The bug only reproduces on real hardware; automated synthetic goldens stayed green, so scientific-method debugging was needed before claiming sign-off.

next_action: Start by reviewing `.planning/debug/vcd-export-nan-inf-timestamps.md`, commit the pending `crates/dsview-sys/bridge_runtime.c` fix if it still looks correct, rebuild with `cargo build -p dsview-cli`, and rerun the documented manual DSLogic Plus capture command to confirm the VCD now has finite monotonic timestamps.
context_notes: The repo is at a useful pause point: 05-03 automated work is merged on master, the manual gate is narrowed to one real-hardware VCD timestamp bug, and a likely fix is already drafted locally. The main thing to preserve is that metadata generation and device reuse already passed manual checks; the remaining failure is specific to VCD replay ordering on real hardware.
